original_image_tags: A small, rectangular, off-white piece of paper or index card, oriented horizontally. The edges are slightly worn. There are two dark, circular punch holes visible at the top left and top right corners, indicating it was likely filed. The background surface upon which the card rests is dark.

elements.description: A small off-white paper or card with handwritten text. Visible text includes 'called', '3:15', and '9/27' near the top right, along with some illegible cursive script or signatures in the lower left. Two dark staple holes or punch marks are visible at the top edge.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific handwritten text ('called', '3:15', '9/27') that Description A does not mention, creating a contradiction on the presence of verbatim text inside the image.
